mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_access_log WHERE short_code = #{shortCode}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ip) FROM t_access_log WHERE short_code = #{shortCode}

SELECT DATE(access_time) as date, COUNT(*) as pv, COUNT(DISTINCT ip) as uv FROM t_access_log WHERE short_code = #{shortCode} AND access_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE(access_time) ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT IFNULL(referer, '直接访问') as referer, COUNT(*) as count FROM t_access_log WHERE short_code = #{shortCode} GROUP BY referer ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT IFNULL(device_type, '未知') as device, COUNT(*) as count FROM t_access_log WHERE short_code = #{shortCode} GROUP BY device_type ORDER BY count DESC
